metadata.description: Maps each deliverable PPTX to the content sections and slides that use them. Auto-populated by generate-training; consumed by content-refresh to trace content changes to affected deliverables.
metadata.note: Registry cleaned: removed stale SE entry (deck not yet generated), corrected Developers section paths after content reorganization, separated training-generated sections.
